mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in industrial production above the 6-month moving average signals a strengthening supply chain that supports positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in strengthening supply periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the unemployment rate below 4.5% signals a tightening labor market that compresses wage growth and supports positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in tightening labor periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in housing starts above 1.2 million signals a strengthening housing market that supports positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in strengthening housing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in real GDP above the 6-month moving average signals a strengthening economy that supports positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in strengthening economy periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the federal funds rate below 4.5% and a 2-month increase in industrial production above the 6-month moving average signal a strengthening economy and easing monetary cycle that supports positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in strengthening economy and easing monetary periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the unemployment rate below 4.5% and a 2-month increase in housing starts above 1.2 million signal a tightening labor market and strengthening housing market that supports positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in tightening labor and strengthening housing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in real GDP above the 6-month moving average and a 2-month increase in industrial production above the 6-month moving average signal a strengthening economy and supply chain that supports positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 > 6-month moving average and INDPRO > 6-month moving average
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in strengthening economy and supply chain periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
